shadow_event.query: 现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

transcript.content: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；
现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…

decision.archive_summary: In the UMC project, the user asked why context data looked wrong and then asked whether per-turn context GC was now working normally. The answer established that GC is evaluated each turn but only applied when conditions are met; in a new conversation with too few turns, GC correctly skips due to the default minTurns=3 threshold.
